name: Heron Data
description: Heron Data offers APIs for SMB classification, underwriting and KYB enrichment, using machine learning to categorize businesses, detect risk and accelerate onboarding for lenders and fintechs.

seo.title: Heron Data — KYC / KYB / AML API
seo.meta_description: Heron Data: Heron Data offers APIs for SMB classification, underwriting and KYB enrichment, using machine learning to categorize businesses, detect risk and acc

when_to_use: SMB business classification API for lender underwriting
KYB business enrichment for fintech merchant onboarding
Cash flow analysis from bank transactions for credit risk
Business risk scoring for BaaS platform onboarding
Fraud signal detection from business transaction patterns

pros: ML classification of SMB transactions for underwriting
KYB enrichment on top of raw business records
Built for lenders who need risk signals fast
Reduces manual analyst work on applications
cons: Scope narrow: SMB lending and underwriting focus
Not a full KYC or sanctions screening vendor
Works best with US and UK data coverage
Requires banking data access to shine
review.verdict: SMB underwriting and classification API for lenders; not a substitute for a full KYB/KYC stack.
review.best_for: SMB lenders and fintechs needing transaction classification and KYB enrichment for underwriting
review.not_for: Teams looking for full KYC, document verification or global sanctions screening coverage

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales pricing; no explicit peak-lock evidence.
